Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_001_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 1 0 0}We have the advantage! They're hardly a threat![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_002_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 2 0 0}We have the advantage! You can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_003_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 3 0 0}The enemy's strong, but you have the first move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_004_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 4 0 0}Two weak enemies! You have the initiative![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_005_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 5 0 0}There's two! Here's your chance to attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_006_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 6 0 0}Two enemies! They're strong, but you can strike first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_007_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 7 0 0}Three targets! They're weak, so let's finish them quick![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_008_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 8 0 0}It's a group of three! You have the initiative![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_009_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 9 0 0}Three targets! They're strong, but you've got the first move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_010_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 10 0 0}There's four of them! They have numbers, but you can act first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_011_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 11 0 0}Four targets, and you have the first move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_012_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 12 0 0}Four enemies! They're tough, but we can attack first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_013_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 13 0 0}Five enemies, but they're no threat! Let's make this quick![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_014_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 14 0 0}Five targets detected! You can attack first![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_015_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 15 0 0}Five powerful foes...! At least we have the first move. You can win this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_016_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 16 0 0}It's weak. Did you let your guard down?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_017_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 17 0 0}Enemy ambush. We can't afford to be careless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_018_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 18 0 0}Incoming enemy attack! It's a strong one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_019_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 19 0 0}Two enemies! They're not strong, but they have the first move![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_020_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 20 0 0}Two targets detected! They have the advantage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_021_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 21 0 0}Two strong foes, and they took the initiative... Brace yourselves![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_022_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 22 0 0}Three enemies! They have the first move, but you can handle them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_023_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 23 0 0}Three targets, and they have the advantage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_024_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 24 0 0}Three powerful enemies... It's an ambush! You have to hold on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_025_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 25 0 0}Four targets. They may be weak, but they got the jump on us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_027_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 27 0 0}We've been ambushed by a strong group—four of them. Just hold on![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_028_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 28 0 0}It's a five-enemy ambush... Luckily, they don't look strong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_029_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 29 0 0}Five enemies! They took the initiative—you have to regroup![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_030_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 30 0 0}Wha—!? Five powerful enemies, and they have the advantage! Hold onto your lives![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_031_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 31 0 0}One enemy. It's no match for you![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_033_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 33 0 0}There's one enemy! It's a tough one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_034_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 34 0 0}Two enemies detected! They're no threat to us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_037_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 37 0 0}Three enemies! They shouldn't be a problem![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_039_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 39 0 0}Three enemies... They're strong, so watch out![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_040_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 40 0 0}Four enemies! They're weak, but they have numbers.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_043_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 43 0 0}Five of them! So the weak find strength in numbers...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_045_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 45 0 0}Five targets! Strong ones, too... We're in for a tough fight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_046_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 46 0 0}This'll be a difficult battle... Stay focused![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_046_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 47 0 0}The enemy's strong... This is going to be a tough fight![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_046_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 48 0 0}This won't be easy... Keep your guard up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_047_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 49 0 0}A rare Shadow... Let's take it out here and now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_047_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 50 0 0}We're in luck! That's not an enemy you see often![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_047_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 51 0 0}That's a rare one! Don't let it escape![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_048_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 52 0 0}This is bad... You have to get out of there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_048_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 53 0 0}You don't stand a chance... Fall back![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_049_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 55 0 0}It's not impossible, but... don't let your guard down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_051_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 59 0 0}This is beyond the level of an ordinary Shadow. Watch yourselves![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_051_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 60 0 0}This could be a tough fight. Don't let your guard down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_051_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 61 0 0}So this area's under guard... Careful, this won't be easy![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_052_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 62 0 0}Multiple team members out of commission... Do you have any means to recover!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_053_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 63 0 0}How could this happen!? Hey, hang in there![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_054_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 64 0 0}Takeba's been knocked out! Can you get her up!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_056_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 66 0 0}Akihiko's been taken out! This is bad![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_062_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 72 0 0}Teammate down! Try to get them back up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_063_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 73 0 0}It looks like your backs are to the wall...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_073_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 83 0 0}Your health is low! Do you have any healing!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_074_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 84 0 0}This is bad... You're falling out of formation![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_075_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 85 0 0}You've been knocked down... Get up, quickly![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_077_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 87 0 0}Iori's been knocked down! Someone cover for him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_088_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 98 0 0}Iori avoided the attack! Great show of skill![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_089_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 99 0 0}Successful dodge from Akihiko! Impressive as always.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_098_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 108 0 0}It ran away! Only two left—you can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_099_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 109 0 0}The enemy fled! There's only one left![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_100_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 110 0 0}The enemy's run from battle. Well done.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_104_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 114 0 0}Looks like Akihiko's attack power is down...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_113_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 123 0 0}Iori's defense has been lowered. Watch yourself![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_120_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 130 0 0}Your defense is down... Watch for incoming attacks![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_121_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 131 0 0}Your speed's been reduced. Can you fix that?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_123_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 133 0 0}This isn't good... Iori's speed was reduced.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_130_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 140 0 0}Your speed's been reduced... This isn't good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_131_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 141 0 0}The enemy's five strong! Take them down one by one![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_132_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 142 0 0}Four targets! There's quite a few of them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_134_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 144 0 0}Two enemies remaining! You can do it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_136_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 146 0 0}The team looks exhausted... Try to focus on healing![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_137_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 147 0 0}Your health's in bad shape... Keep an eye on it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_138_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 148 0 0}Takeba's in danger... Someone patch her up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_139_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 149 0 0}Iori's in bad shape. He needs to recover.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_146_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 156 0 0}You've taken heavy damage... Can anyone afford to heal?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_147_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 157 0 0}You've been frozen. Hold on and wait for backup.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_149_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 159 0 0}Iori's frozen solid! Try to cover for him![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_156_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 166 0 0}You've been frozen! Can someone offer backup?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_157_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 167 0 0}You can't move while you're paralyzed. Wait until you've recovered![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_158_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 168 0 0}Takeba's been paralyzed! Can anyone help her out?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_159_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 169 0 0}Iori's been shocked stiff! Try to back him up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_166_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 176 0 0}You're paralyzed! Do you have a way to recover?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_168_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 178 0 0}Takeba's been charmed! Can you bring her back to her senses?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_169_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 179 0 0}Iori's been charmed... Snap him out of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_170_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 180 0 0}Akihiko... He's fallen into the enemy's trap...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_176_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 186 0 0}You've been charmed! Can anyone step in to help?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_177_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 187 0 0}You've been poisoned... Can anyone treat it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_178_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 188 0 0}Takeba's been poisoned! Does anyone have an antidote?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_180_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 190 0 0}Akihiko's been poisoned... Can anyone cure him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_186_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 196 0 0}You've been poisoned... Do you have a cure?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_200_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 210 0 0}Akihiko's confused! Please, snap out of it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_207_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 217 0 0}You'll overcome the fear soon! Just hold on for now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_216_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 226 0 0}Your fear is taking over! Someone step in to help![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_218_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 228 0 0}Takeba's not thinking straight... Can anyone help her?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_219_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 229 0 0}Iori's rage is out of control... Can somebody calm him?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_220_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 230 0 0}Akihiko's letting anger get to him... Please, come to your senses![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_236_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 246 0 0}You're dizzy! Are you unable to get up?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_238_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 248 0 0}Takeba's back on her feet! It's time to retaliate![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_240_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 250 0 0}That's it, Akihiko! Just keep that going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_247_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 257 0 0}If you Shift, you can target the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_247_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 258 0 0}If you're going for their weak spot, switching team members is an option.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_247_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 259 0 0}Try switching teammates to hit the enemy's weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_247_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 260 0 0}Coordinate with the team to strike the enemy's weak points![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_247_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 261 0 0}If you coordinate, you may be able to hit a weak spot...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_248_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 262 0 0}Your health is low. Do something before you get hit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_248_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 263 0 0}You look worn out... This might be your only chance to fix it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_248_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 264 0 0}You've taken some heavy hits... Patch yourself up while you still can![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_248_04
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 265 0 0}You've taken a lot of damage... Take care of it while there's still time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_248_05
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 266 0 0}Your health is getting low! Do you have time to recover?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_249_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 267 0 0}The enemy's frozen! They'll make a prime target![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_250_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 268 0 0}Paralyzed enemy! This is the perfect moment to strike![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_275_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 293 0 0}Akihiko took out the enemy. Just what I'd expect.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_293_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 311 0 0}Takeba's taken down four of them! Looking promising![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_295_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 313 0 0}Akihiko wiped out four of them! Well done![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_301_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 319 0 0}Great work! You took out four at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_302_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 320 0 0}You're doing well! That's three down at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_303_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 321 0 0}Takeba took down three with that attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_305_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 323 0 0}Akihiko took out three! Keep it up![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_313_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 331 0 0}Takeba took out two of them! Keep going![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_314_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 332 0 0}That's two fewer than before! Good job, Iori![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_315_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 333 0 0}Nice hit from Akihiko! That took out two at once![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_331_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 349 0 0}Good, that's one less to worry about![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_333_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 351 0 0}That's an enemy down! Good job, Takeba![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_342_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 360 0 0}Just what we like to see. That's four enemies down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_343_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 361 0 0}That's four down! Keep it up, Takeba![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_354_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 372 0 0}You're doing it, Iori! That's three down![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_364_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 382 0 0}That's two knocked down! Well done, Iori![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_365_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 383 0 0}That's it, Akihiko! You knocked down two of them![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_371_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 389 0 0}Two enemies down! You can do this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_373_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 391 0 0}That's an enemy down! Good job, Takeba![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_382_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 400 0 0}Excellent work! You hit a weak spot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_383_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 401 0 0}That hit the enemy's weakness! You're doing great, Takeba![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_384_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 402 0 0}You hit a weak point! Not bad, Iori![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_385_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 403 0 0}Direct hit on their weakness! Just what I'd expect, Akihiko![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_391_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 409 0 0}You hit a weak spot! That dealt some damage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_395_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 413 0 0}Good one, Akihiko! That was a critical hit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_432_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 453 0 0}Here's your chance for an All-Out Attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_434_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 460 0 0}Hold on. I'm trying to secure an escape route![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_435_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 461 0 0}I can't let you retreat. You'll have to get through this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_436_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 462 0 0}Hold on. I'm trying to secure an escape route![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_438_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 464 0 0}I'm sorry. Your escape route was cut off.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_439_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 465 0 0}There, you can go for a weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_439_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 466 0 0}You should be able to hit a weak spot![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_439_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 467 0 0}Here's your chance! You can target a weakness![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_440_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 468 0 0}It doesn't look like you can strike any weaknesses...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_440_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 469 0 0}You can't go for any weak points...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_440_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 470 0 0}Ngh... I don't think you can hit any weak spots...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_441_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 471 0 0}One of your teammates can hit a weakness! Shift to switch attackers![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_441_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 472 0 0}There's someone else who can target a weakness. Shifting might help.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_441_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 473 0 0}You can go for a weak spot if you Shift to swap out.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_442_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 474 0 0}You have an attack that works well.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_442_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 475 0 0}You have a skill that's effective here.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_442_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 476 0 0}Looks like you can deal good damage.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_443_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 477 0 0}You can hit the enemy's weakness with your weapon![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_443_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 478 0 0}The enemy's weak to your standard attack![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_443_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 479 0 0}The enemy seems weak to physical attacks.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_444_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 481 0 0}Using your weapon could be an effective approach.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_445_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 483 0 0}You could go for effective damage, but it might behoove you to scout for more weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_445_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 484 0 0}You have a good option right now, but the enemy may have other weaknesses.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_446_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 485 0 0}We don't know the enemy's weakness... You'll just have to see what works.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_446_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 486 0 0}If only we knew the enemy's weaknesses... See if you can find them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_447_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 487 0 0}You have an item that can hit their weakness. This is the perfect time![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_447_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 488 0 0}If you use an item, you can target the enemy's weakness...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_447_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 489 0 0}You're carrying something that can hit a weakness.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_448_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 490 0 0}All right, you won. Great work out there.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_449_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 493 0 0}The enemy's fled. You almost had it...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_454_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 502 0 0}This opponent looks tough... Be on your guard.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_455_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 503 0 0}This may be a good test of your skill.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_456_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 504 0 0}This one isn't much of a threat, but don't get careless.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_459_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 507 0 0}You can hit the enemy's weakness with a pierce![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_461_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 509 0 0}Looks like the enemy's weak to Ice![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_462_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 510 0 0}Go for the enemy's weakness to Wind![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_464_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 512 0 0}So the enemy is weak to Light...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_475_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 523 0 0}Charm would be effective here. Do you have any way to inflict it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_476_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 524 0 0}Poison would work well—might be worth trying.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_477_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 525 0 0}If you can distress the enemy, you might find an opening.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_478_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 526 0 0}Confusion may be useful here. Shall we give it a try?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_479_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 527 0 0}The enemy's susceptible to fear. Double down on the pressure![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_480_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 528 0 0}This one seems short-tempered. Maybe you can enrage them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_496_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 563 0 0}There's an enemy with an ailment. That's an opening for us![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_496_02
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 564 0 0}The enemy's in poor condition. That gives us an advantage![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_496_03
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 565 0 0}Ailment detected on enemy Shadow. Let's make the most of this![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_533_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 600 0 0}I've never seen one this big before, but there's no time... We have to end this, now![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_534_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 601 0 0}Ngh... It called in reinforcements! Just what we needed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: AST_btl_05_535_01
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 2 0 -1 602 0 0}The monorail is going even faster now! You're running out of time![n]{f 1 1}
